LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 16, 2013 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. NO LATER THAN 4 P.M., APRIL 26, 2013, THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE OR THE MOTION IS SUBJECT TO BEING DENIED WITHOUT FURTHER NOTICE. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-16-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-16-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUNE 5, 2013. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-05-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN AND PLAINTIFF FAILS TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE REGARDING WHETHER AN ASSAULT AND BATTERY TOOK PLACE OR WHETHER OFFICER MARCIC'S ACTIONS WERE OBJECTIVELY UNREASONABLE. PLAINTIFF RELIES ON HIS OWN DECLARATION WHICH CONTRADICTS HIS PREVIOUS SWORN DEPOSITION TESTIMONY. SUCH EVIDENCE IS INSUFFICIENT TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS 1, 2, 3, AND 3 (SIC) TO DECLARATION OF RICHARD BONOMI ARE SUSTAINED. OBJECTION 4 IS OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: L. FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: thomas o'brien, esq., 415.756.9200, for plaintiff richard bomoni.
matthew s. conant, esq., 510.433.2600, for defendant city and county of san francisco.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant shifted the burden and Plaintiff fails to raise a triable issue regarding whether an assault and battery took place or whether Officer Marcic's actions were objectively unreasonable. Plaintiff relies on his own declaration which contradicts his previous sworn deposition testimony. Such evidence is insufficient to raise a triable issue. Defendant's objections 1, 2, 3, and 3 (sic) to Declaration of Richard Bonomi are sustained. Objection 4 is overruled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: L. Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued on the Court's own motion to June 5, 2013. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Continued To May-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to May 16, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. No later than 4 p.m., April 26, 2013, the moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its moving and reply papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date or the motion is subject to being denied without further notice. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
